zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Peniston於1424年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾霍利其時，他的父親Sir John de Peniston II39歲，母親Lady Eleanor Chesham30歲。他於1445年與Margaret Heries在英國巴金哈姆爾霍利其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Peniston于1424年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾霍利其时，他的父亲Sir John de Peniston II39岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Chesham30岁。他于1445年与Margaret Heries在英国巴金哈姆爾霍利其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年在他的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peniston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Penistone near Sheffield (Yorkshire), or, less likely, Penistone in Stainmore (Cumbria). The Yorkshire placename is of uncertain etymology, but may derive from Proto-Welsh penn ‘head’ + the Old English placename forming suffix -ing (genitive -inges) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The etymology of the Cumbrian placename is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Peniston was born in 1424, in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir John de Peniston II, was 39 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Chesham, was 30. He married Margaret Heries in 1445, in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1465, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Peniston est né en 1424, à Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Peniston II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Chesham, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Heries en 1445, à Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1465, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Peniston 1424 in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Peniston II 39 und seine Mutter Lady Eleanor Chesham 30. Er hat 1445 in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England Margaret Heries geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1465 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Peniston è nato il nel 1424 nel Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Peniston II, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eleanor Chesham, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Heries nel 1445, nel Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1465, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Peniston(이)가 1424년 영국 벅잉함실르 호리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Peniston II(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Chesham(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 벅잉함실르 호리지에서 Margaret Heries(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Peniston родился в 1424 г. в местности харидж, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Peniston II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Chesham, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Heries в 1445 г. в местности харидж, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1465 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Peniston nació en 1424, en Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Peniston II, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Chesham, tenía 30 años.
